name: Inspiration
description: Cinematic visuals and bucket list goals to spark your next big adventure.

name: Breakfast & Brunch
description: Morning to early afternoon dining. Visuals: Coffee, eggs, pastries, bright natural light, relaxed social groups.

name: Lunch & Dinner
description: Mid-day to late evening substantial meals. Visuals: Plated entrees, restaurant interiors, savory dishes, sit-down service.

name: Bars
description: Beverage-focused venues. Visuals: Cocktails, beer taps, wine glasses, bartenders, lounge seating, conversational atmosphere.

name: Rooftops
description: Elevated venues on building tops. Visuals: Must show cityscapes, horizons, or high-altitude views as the primary background.

name: Nightlife
description: High-energy late-night venues. Visuals: Dance floors, DJs, strobe lights, dark environments, clubbing, and loud music.

name: Culture & History
description: Educational or heritage sites. Visuals: Museums, monuments, ancient architecture, art galleries, and historical plaques.

name: Outdoor & Adventure
description: Active nature-based experiences. Visuals: Hiking, water sports, mountains, forests, and physical movement/exercise.

name: Leisure & Relaxation
description: Low-energy wellness. Visuals: Spas, beach lounging, park picnics, quiet scenic views, and slow lifestyle shots.

name: Entertainment
description: Organized events/shows. Visuals: Theater stages, cinemas, concerts, bowling alleys, or amusement park rides.

name: Shopping
description: Commercial exchange. Visuals: Malls, luxury boutiques, local markets, storefronts, and people carrying shopping bags.

name: Hidden Gems
description: Secret or non-touristy spots. Visuals: Narrow alleys, local hole-in-the-walls, lack of crowds, unpolished/authentic charm.

name: Famous Places
description: Globally recognized icons. Visuals: Famous landmarks (Eiffel Tower, etc.), heavy tourist crowds, postcard angles.

name: Tours
description: Guided learning. Visuals: A guide leading a group, people wearing headsets, tour buses, or educational walking groups.

name: Accomodation
description: Lodging/Stay. Visuals: Hotel lobbies, bedrooms, resort pools, Airbnb interiors, and hospitality amenities.

name: Transportation
description: Movement logistics. Visuals: Trains, planes, taxis, rental scooters, transit maps, and airport/station signage.

name: Essentials
description: Practical utility. Visuals: Pharmacies, ATMs, grocery stores, SIM card shops, and health/safety information.
